author: runner-10
rationale: Input pin only (P2 P-9: a PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholder completed by ops amendment before any final-phase run; no design field is touched — the replace target /pins/corpus_hashes/authored-explication-set carries the placeholder 'PINNED-AT-INPUTS:g9.author (N>=50 machine-authored explications + validator outputs; ops amendment before any final-phase run)' pre-declared in the frozen g9 record). The g9.author node output is now complete at data/authored-explication-set/: 50 kot-ast/1 explications (concepts/, arm=fable-class-authoring, exactly the frozen seed-0 selection selection/selected-50.json = random.Random(0).sample over the 149-row test split of the DeepNSM dataset baartmar/nsm_dataset, per selection/selection-manifest.json), the authoring sources (src/batch-a..e.mjs + helpers.mjs + the deterministic builder src/build.mjs), the BLINDED g9.review materials (review/sheets.json seed-0-shuffled with the dataset reference explications and all authoring notes withheld; unblinding key review/sheet-key.json), and the mechanical validator outputs (validation/validator-report.json, validation/mechanical-summary.json, validation/loop-log.jsonl). Mechanical gates under the pinned encoder (encoderContentHash = 40e8c8ba4c3d081c5051ea62d946d2ee9ee9f3205853b5c377a4c1e647e2d10c, matches the frozen pins.encoder_hash): validateExplication profile-1 grammar/valency/referent gates + encodeExplication with unit-norm/NaN sanity — 50/50 pass; validator liveness confirmed by four negative-control probes (ERR_PRIME_UNKNOWN, ERR_OP_ARITY, ERR_REF_UNDECLARED, ERR_ROLE_REQUIRED_MISSING); rebuild verified byte-deterministic over all content files (loop-log excluded as an append-only trace). The mechanical result is the legality leg ONLY and is an upper bound on the composite endpoint: substitutability + cross-translatability are scored at g9.review (GATE-H, blinded human review) per the Baartmans et al. metric definitions reused as-is, so no verdict-bearing quantity exists at this node (blinded_review_done=0; see ASM-0380). This ops amendment resolves the placeholder to the kot-corpus-hash/1 digest of data/authored-explication-set/ (tools/registry/corpus-pin.py authored-explication-set = 6a51f44a079c777ffc9df412cc5eb2b41053806f383b329cda77f24c8ca1591c), covering every regular file under that tree. verdict-gen applies this as an overlay on the frozen record in seq order before readout; the frozen file, its frozen_sha256 anchor and every design field are byte-untouched. One-shot pin discipline: any change to those bytes before the final-phase run invalidates this value and requires a pre-run correction record, not a new ops amendment — in particular the g9.review JUDGMENTS must be recorded OUTSIDE data/authored-explication-set/ (results-log lane) so the pinned review inputs stay byte-identical through readout.
